gum_entity_coreference.claim_scope: human GUM source-declared entity mentions, attributes, complete non-singleton coreference components, typed directed coreference links, and bridging links with complete endpoint components; native CoNLL independently confirms exact component membership and CoNLL-U confirms aggregate mention/component topology. This does not claim ontological identity, truth, complete sentence semantics, public coreference performance, cross-document identity, or learned competence

gum_erst_discourse.claim_scope: human eRST primary discourse dependencies plus source-declared secondary edges over complete projected discourse units; authority covers relation label, direction, nuclearity where declared, source alignment, and signal count only, not truth, full proposition scope, complete sentence semantics, public GUM/DISRPT performance, or learned competence

scoped_semantic_supervision.claim_scope: licensed human eRST direction and endpoint spans support seven conservative two-proposition scope families only; multi-edge shared-endpoint neighborhoods and all other relations remain explicit missingness. This is not complete proposition semantics, sentence truth, learned competence, public performance, or KERC utility

masc_composite_semantics.claim_scope: manual FrameNet multi-frame structure over one source sentence; multiple annotated propositions are preserved without claiming inter-frame discourse edges, complete sentence semantics, truth, or reasoning utility

masc_contextual_frame_ambiguity.claim_scope: manual FrameNet contextual sense selection with alternatives and empirical source-train priors; not unresolved ambiguity, calibrated probability, WordNet equivalence, or model utility

masc_decision_semantics.claim_scope: manual MASC committed-belief, MPQA subjectivity, and event annotations aligned to one source sentence; authority covers only the observed spans, labels, and source fields, not truth, complete sentence semantics, lost event-coreference grouping, or unresolved cross-annotation links

masc_event_coreference.claim_scope: manual named GATE event-coreference membership and independently aligned mention identity only; no co-occurrence inference, truth, causal, temporal, or complete-sentence-semantic claim

masc_mpqa_relations.claim_scope: manual MPQA direct-subjective to attitude, attitude to target, and ordered nested-source membership from complete uniquely resolved raw annotation links; no inferred relation, proposition scope, truth, causality, temporality, complete sentence semantics, or learned competence

score_semantics: independent source replay and schema admission; not model capability
